title: taraxacum syrtorum
intro: Taraxacum syrtorum, also known as the Crimean dandelion, is a rare plant species in the sunflower family, native to the Crimean Peninsula. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum syrtorum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as hypertension and liver disease. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, are typically used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
